title: cooling norwegian cod tacos
description: a refreshing post-workout norwegian dish featuring pan-seared cod, crunchy slaw, and a squeeze of fresh lime juice, all wrapped in a low-glycemic-friendly corn tortilla.
instructions: heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
add the cod fillets and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
while the cod is cooking, combine the shredded cabbage, grated carrots, apple cider vinegar, and honey in a large bowl.
mix well and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the slaw to chill and the flavors to meld.
once the cod is cooked, remove it from the skillet and set aside to rest.
add the remaining 1 tablespoon of coconut oil to the skillet and sauté the chopped cilantro for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
assemble the tacos by placing a piece of the seared cod onto a warmed tortilla, followed by a spoonful of the chilled slaw and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
